'''Hiksri Jith''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who served in the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] crew headed by [[Erli Prann]]. Prann and his fellow pirates gained control of a [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], also discovering one of Thrawn's prototype [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking devices]] which they used to their advantage in hiding their newly acquired Golan II Platform.

During the [[Second Battle of Bilbringi]], which was part of Operation Trinity, Hiksri Jith usurped power from Prann and lent the aid of the pirates Golan SpaceGun to the beleaguered [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] forces, eventually turning complete control of the platform over to the Alliance.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
